ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team is in */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the current commissioner of the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the league's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the division is in */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the division's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the division's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the division's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "games_behind" REAL /* Number of games behind the division leader */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed */,
  "pythagorean_winning_percentage" REAL /* Pythagorean winning percentage */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "win_streak" INTEGER /* Current win streak */,
  "lose_streak" INTEGER /* Current lose streak */,
  "run_differential" INTEGER /* Run differential */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data is for */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view_performance, download_report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that plays in the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "opened" TEXT /* Date the stadium opened */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., grass, turf) */,
  "roof_type" TEXT /* Type of roof (e.g., open, retractable) */,
  "stadium_website_url" TEXT /* URL to the stadium's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the stadium's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
